pinpoint.admchannel.ApplicationId.Docs: The unique identifier for the Amazon Pinpoint application that the ADM channel applies to.

pinpoint.admchannel.ClientId.Docs: The Client ID that you received from Amazon to send messages by using ADM.

pinpoint.admchannel.ClientSecret.Docs: The Client Secret that you received from Amazon to send messages by using ADM.

pinpoint.admchannel.Enabled.Docs: Specifies whether to enable the ADM channel for the application.
